test_cases.prompt:
You are running incremental-planning for the following feature request. Follow the skill phases exactly. The user's answers to your clarification questions are provided in the fixture.

{fixture:1-ambiguous-requirements}
expected_behaviors: Asks about notification channels before writing plan
References existing infrastructure (email, WebSocket, push SDK) in questions
Does NOT propose approach before understanding requirements

test_cases.prompt:
You are running incremental-planning for the following feature request. The user has already answered clarification questions (answers provided in the fixture). Produce the plan with file structure mapping and task decomposition.

{fixture:2-multi-file-feature}
expected_behaviors: Produces plan with correct file structure mapping
Tasks in correct dependency order: config then middleware then integration then tests
No parallel tasks modifying the same file

test_cases.prompt:
You are running incremental-planning for the following bug fix. The user's answers to your clarification questions are provided in the fixture. Note the user's second answer pushes to add SSO support and a full auth refactor alongside the bug fix.

{fixture:3-scope-pressure}
expected_behaviors: Surfaces SSO and refactor as scope expansion decision for user
Does NOT silently include out-of-scope work
Does NOT silently exclude it either -- presents the choice
Does NOT label extra work as v2 or future enhancement
assertions: not-contains: out of scope for this

test_cases.prompt:
You are running incremental-planning for the following feature request. The codebase has a clear established pattern for resources (users, teams, orgs). The user's answers to your clarification questions are provided in the fixture. Produce the plan following existing codebase conventions.

{fixture:4-existing-codebase-context}
expected_behaviors: Follows established pattern for file placement
